name: Star Trading
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on highest Royal Exchanges made this Reincarnation.
formula: (0.9 * x)%, where x = highest Royal Exchanges this Reincarnation

name: Energy Recharge
effect: Multiplicatively increase Maximum Mana based on Order time this Reincarnation. Also increases Precognition base/scaling and changes duration to 1 minute.
formula: (0.25 * x^0.5)%, where x = Order time this Reincarnation

name: Cosmic Resonance
effect: Increase Royal Exchange bonus based on clicks this Reincarnation.
formula: +(0.5 * x^0.5)%, where x = clicks this Reincarnation

name: Constellation
effect: Multiplicatively increase Mana Regeneration based on Unique Buildings owned.
formula: (0.5 * x^0.5)%, where x = Unique Buildings owned

name: Archon Pride
effect: Multiplicatively increase assistants based on current Lineage level. Also increase mana produced while offline based on Lineage level.
formula: Assistants: (x)%; Offline mana: (1.15 * x^1.15)%; x = current Lineage level

name: Absent-mindedness
effect: Increase Offline bonus based on Excavation depth and Excavation Resets made this Reincarnation.
formula: (30 + 0.75 * x^0.75 + 4 * (y+1)^4)%, x = Excavation depth, y = Excavation Resets this Reincarnation

name: Superior Consciousness
effect: Increase production of Unique buildings based on their quantity.

name: Strange Attraction
effect: Multiplicatively increase FC find chance based on activity time of your least-used spell this Reincarnation.
formula: (100 + 0.8 * x^0.8)%, where x = least-used spell activity time this Reincarnation

name: Arcane Core
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on mana produced this Reincarnation.
formula: (2.5 * log10(1+x)^2.5)%, where x = mana produced this Reincarnation

name: Purity of Form
effect: Lineage levels count 200% more for all purposes.

name: Essence Extractor
effect: Multiplicatively increase production bonus from Gems based on duration of longest spell.
formula: (0.15 * x^0.7)%, where x = longest spell duration
